scope_summary: Run the symptom-classification phase for ASMS UI is down. Assume the customer still reports GUI down even though local shallow surfaces may be healthy. Stay shallow: host sanity, HTTPD/Apache edge, core service state, listeners, local UI/login reachability, and first usable shell classification only. End with one plain support classification such as external path or browser-side issue, login path issue, first shell transition issue, or later workflow issue. Do not inspect /seikan/login/setup, SuiteLoginSessionValidation, BusinessFlow, FireFlow, AFA, AFF, Metro internals, Keycloak OIDC, ActiveMQ, database, or broad logs unless a shallow check clearly fails.
